name: Hammond Recreation
description: Come play pickleball at Hammond Recreation in Hammond, LA! There are 4 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Lighthouse Ranch for Boys
description: Lighthouse Ranch for Boys is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Loranger, LA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net.

name: North Cypress Fitness Club
description: North Cypress Fitness Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hammond, LA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Ponchatoula Area Recreation District No. 1
description: Ponchatoula Area Recreation District No. 1 is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ponchatoula, LA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Reunion Lake RV Park
description: Reunion Lake RV Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ponchatoula, LA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: RMS
description: Come play pickleball at RMS in Roseland, LA! You'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Southeastern University Tennis Courts
description: Great spot! No working lights but the tennis courts kinda lit up our court and made it work for us.
